prompt_text: What are some high-protein snacks I can buy at the store?
response_text:
# High-Protein Store-Bought Snacks

**Convenient options:**
- Greek yogurt
- String cheese or cheese cubes
- Hard-boiled eggs
- Nuts and seeds (almonds, peanuts, sunflower seeds)
- Beef jerky or turkey jerky
- Protein bars
- Roasted chickpeas
- Cottage cheese

**Packaged options:**
- Mixed nuts
- Peanut or almond butter packets
- Protein chips
- Tuna or salmon packets
- Edamame (roasted)
- Protein powder (to mix with milk or water)

**Combinations that work well:**
- Cheese + crackers
- Nuts + dried fruit
- Yogurt + granola
- Jerky + fruit

Most of these are readily available at any grocery store and require little to no preparation. The best choice depends on your taste preferences and whether you prefer something quick or something you can eat over time.
